Who We Serve

Built for the people carrying the most weight

We work with healthcare practices and small businesses where one person is holding everything together — and the world keeps changing faster than they can keep up.

Healthcare Practices

Physicians, dentists, therapists, and the teams running their practices — navigating patient care, compliance, billing, and now AI all at once.

  • Hours lost daily to prior authorizations and documentation
  • Patient follow-up and scheduling chaos
  • Phone and inbox management overwhelming the front desk
  • No time to evaluate or implement new tools
  • Feeling left behind as healthcare technology accelerates

Small & Medium Businesses

Business owners and operations managers running lean teams who know automation could transform their operations — but have no roadmap to get there.

  • Manual processes eating hours that should go to growth
  • Disconnected tools that don't talk to each other
  • No IT department — just one person figuring it all out
  • AI feels overwhelming, expensive, or out of reach
  • Too busy surviving to build the systems that would help them thrive

What We Do

We carry what your practice demands

Practical, hands-on AI and automation services — built around your real workflows, your real budget, and your real goals.

01

AI Agent Deployment

We design, build, and deploy autonomous AI agents that handle your most time-consuming workflows — from patient intake to follow-up calls — so your team focuses on what only humans can do.

Intake Automation AI Scheduling Follow-up Agents
02

Workflow Automation

We map your current operations, identify the highest-impact bottlenecks, and build automated workflows that connect your tools and eliminate the manual steps stealing your day.

Process Mapping Tool Integration Custom Automations
03

Managed AI Infrastructure

For practices and businesses that want AI running in the background — always on, always working — without needing an IT team to maintain it. We set it up and keep it running.

Setup & Deployment Ongoing Management Monthly Retainer

How It Works

Simple, clear, no surprises

We don't do lengthy discovery projects or complicated onboarding. We move fast, start small, and build from real results.

1

Free 30-Min Call

We listen first. You tell us what your days actually look like and where the weight is heaviest. No pitch, no pressure.

2

We Map the Weight

We identify the highest-impact workflows — the ones stealing the most time — and build a clear, affordable plan to address them.

3

We Build & Deploy

We do the technical work. You don't need to understand AI or automation. You just need to see it working in your practice.

4

Care Flows Freely

Your operations run lighter. Your team breathes easier. You get back to the work you actually got into this for.

Dave Horton

Founder, Cariflow · Long Beach, CA

A note from Dave

The people who care most deserve someone who cares just as much.

I'm a DevOps architect by trade. I've spent years building infrastructure for large organizations — the kind of automation, AI systems, and workflow tooling that quietly saves them thousands of hours a year. And the whole time, in the back of my mind, I kept thinking: the people who need this most don't have access to any of it.

The physician staying late finishing notes after a full day of patients. The office manager who is, somehow, the entire IT department, the scheduler, the insurance liaison, and the person answering the phone — all at once. I see you. And I know that nobody's coming to help unless you go find them yourself.

That's why I started Cariflow. Not to sell software. Not to pitch a platform. But to be the person who actually shows up, learns how your practice or business works, and helps carry the weight — practically, affordably, and without making you feel like you need a computer science degree to understand what we're doing together.

You got into this work for a reason. I'd love to help you get back to it.

DevOps Architecture AI Agent Deployment Workflow Automation Healthcare SMBs Small Business Real. Human. Help.
